# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

snapshot.repo:
  type: s3
  settings:
    bucket_name: elasticsearch-backups
    region: us-west-2
    role_arn: arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/elasticsearch-snapshot-role

path.repo: /mnt/backups

snapshot.indices:
  my_index:
    paths.include: "my_index_*"
    schedules:
      - cron: 0 8 * * *

snapshot.create:
  repository: snapshot.repo
  indices: my_index
  wait_for_completion: true

snapshot.restore:
  repository: snapshot.repo
  indices: my_index
  wait_for_completion: true
